{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230425568BE7A09698BE4661DEC9"}"},"total":6707},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7249351007216747316","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好是很好作者的文笔也很好，在我看来唯一一个比较重的问题是主角从来没有出过手还有就是主角出来的太少了，作者几乎没写主角的感觉[捂脸]，总体来说的话作者的文笔好剧情也很不错"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1687871105,"group_id":"7203431188764036100","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不知道说什么","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxT4+nGb1OBlT7fH3LeZ28b4XgQJRvzyPKm2InBGnDzN","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/eb1fc826120d40348d823bffa4e88b71~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791275&x-signature=rzBPgk9Jgmo57%2BSZoaC3WCOFERg%3D","user_id":"4410870998500827","user_name":"去玩游戏"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4410870998500827","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7203431188764036100","book_info":{"abstract":"【无敌➕宗门➕收徒➕无限爽➕召唤➕无女主➕不墨迹直接干】
无人扶我青云志，我自登山建帝宗！
本书又名：“吾宗内外皆大帝，阁下如何应对？“仙路难登？青云那群仙帝怎么事？”
什么！你怎么知道我青云宗看门的狗都是大帝？
风清扬成为掌门后激活了诸天神宗系统，开局就召唤来了大帝境界老祖，从此人生达到了巅峰……
大弟子石浩：至尊圣体，天生至尊！独断万古！
二弟子林白：青莲剑体，剑气纵横三万里，号青莲剑仙
三弟子花轻语：凤凰圣体，神圣凤凰、遨游九天，人称凤凰女帝
……
某圣地家主：我求求你们让我当个杂役弟子吧，看门的也行，呜呜！
帝族家主：看门的？你不知道他们宗门看门的狗都是大帝境？你也配！
愿我青云宗青云直上，穷且益坚，不坠青云之志！
